Title: Map Stability - Basic Operations
Preconditions: PR #2138 deployed; Cart has products; Multiple pickup locations configured
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Pickup' radio button in delivery options
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup location modal opens with map and location list
[ACT] measure map container dimensions
[ACT] type location name in search field
[WAIT] search results update
[ASSERT] map dimensions unchanged
[ACT] click X button to clear search
[WAIT] all locations restored
[ASSERT] map dimensions unchanged
[ACT] type address in search field
[ACT] clear search manually
[ACT] repeat search/clear cycle three more times
Assertions:
[DOM] pickup modal opens without errors
[DOM] map renders with markers
[STATE] map container dimensions remain stable across all search interactions
[STATE] no visual layout jump or shift observed after each clear/search cycle
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during modal interactions
[NETWORK] no 5xx errors on search API calls
Failure_Signals: Map dimension changes during search (VCST-4518 regression); Map width drops below 40% after search; console TypeError on map interaction; Modal not responding to search input
Cleanup: Close modal; navigate away from cart

[DOM] 'Select' button present in location info card
[DOM] pickup location name and address visible in cart summary after confirm
[STATE] modal fully closes after Confirm

Title: Completed BOPIS Order Appears Correctly in Order History
Preconditions: Authenticated user who has previously completed at least one BOPIS pickup order; Order is in 'Processing' or 'Completed' status
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] log in with credentials {{USER_EMAIL}} / {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[WAIT] authenticated; account menu visible
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] order history page loads with list of past orders
[ACT] locate the most recent BOPIS/pickup order in the list
[ASSERT] order list entry indicates fulfillment type 'Pickup' (icon, label, or tag)
[ACT] click on the BOPIS order to open order details
[WAIT] order detail page loads
[ASSERT] pickup location name and address shown in order details
[ASSERT] no 'Shipping Address' or delivery address section displayed
[ASSERT] fulfillment type label reads 'Pickup' or equivalent
[ASSERT] no shipping carrier or tracking number section visible
Assertions:
[DOM] order history list entry shows pickup indicator (label, icon, or 'Pickup' tag)
[DOM] order detail page contains pickup location name and full address
[STATE] no shipping address section rendered on BOPIS order detail page
[STATE] no shipping carrier / tracking number section visible

Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors loading order detail page
[NETWORK] order detail API returns 2xx; response includes fulfillment type and pickup location fields
[API] order query returns fulfillmentType = 'Pickup' and fulfillmentCenter details; shippingAddress field is null or absent
Failure_Signals: Shipping address section visible on BOPIS order detail; Fulfillment type shows 'Delivery' or 'Shipping' instead of 'Pickup'; Pickup location name/address missing from order details; Tracking number section incorrectly shown
